message:
fix(diagnostics): use split_off instead of drain for log compaction

Replace drain(0..head) with split_off(head) when compacting the
diagnostic log ring buffer. split_off returns the tail as a new Vec
and truncates in-place, which is both clearer in intent and avoids
the implicit element-shifting behavior of drain on a contiguous range.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
